title: Dactylorhiza × scampstonii
taxonomy: Dactylorhiza × scampstonii is a hybrid orchid species that is the result of a cross between Dactylorhiza fuchsii and Dactylorhiza maculata. It is classified as a hybrid orchid under the genus Dactylorhiza. Dactylorhiza × scampstonii is a rare and unique species, found primarily in the UK. As a hybrid, it is not assigned a separate binomial nomenclature. This hybrid orchid is often found in wet, acidic soils in areas with low levels of disturbance.
